message:
fix: normalize issue_prefix in transaction and import paths to prevent double-hyphen IDs

The CreateIssue and ImportIssues code paths in transaction.go and issues.go
were missing the TrimSuffix normalization that was already present in the
standalone CreateIssue and createWisp paths. This could still produce
double-hyphen IDs (e.g. 'gt--abc') if configPrefix had a trailing hyphen.

Fixes: bd-6uly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
